  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Cylinder
    Class Cylinder represents a finite cylinder in 3D space.
    Double3
    Immutable container for three double values.
    Geometry
    Abstract base class for all geometric objects.
    Main
    Basic sanity tests for the primitives classes.
    Plane
    Class Plane represents a plane in 3D space.
    Point
    Class Point represents a point in 3D Cartesian coordinates.
    Polygon
    Represents a convex polygon in a 3D Cartesian coordinate system.
    RadialGeometry
    Abstract base class for geometries that have a radius.
    Ray
    Class Ray represents a ray in 3D space.
    Sphere
    Class Sphere represents a sphere in 3D space.
    Triangle
    Class Triangle represents a triangle in 3D space.
    Tube
    Class Tube represents an infinite cylindrical tube in 3D space.
    Util
    Collection of low-level utility methods used throughout the primitives package.
    Vector
    Class Vector represents a non-zero vector in 3D Cartesian coordinates.
